summary: Startup Apps scans login items, Dock apps, and launch agents, then uses Apple Intelligence to recommend what should stay enabled at boot.
introduced: Startup Apps — new sidebar menu item that lists Open at Login apps, Dock-pinned apps, user Launch Agents, and background startup items when opened
Boot-time AI analysis — each startup app gets a Keep at login, Disable at login, or Optional verdict with a short explanation from Apple Intelligence (rule-based fallback when AI is unavailable)
